---
title: "Data Sources"
subtitle: "Tutorial: EON Summer School 2024"
author: Chris Reudenbach, Philipps University Marburg (PUM)
date: "2023-08-30"
image: ../images/mc4.png

about:
  id: image-heading
  template: solana
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 25em
  links:
    - icon: shop-window
      text: 2023 Station inside the dead Fir plot (Ecowitt Dashboard Login required)
      href: https://www.ecowitt.net/home/index?id=149300
    - icon: shop-window
      text: 2023 Station inside the clear cut (Ecowitt Dashboard Login required)
      href: https://www.ecowitt.net/home/index?id=20166
    - icon: shop-window
      text: 2023 Position Data of the climate stations
      href: https://github.com/HannaMeyer/EON2023/blob/main/mc_session/data/stations_prelim.zip
    - icon: shop-window
      text: 2024 Position Data of the climate stations 
      href: https://github.com/earth-observation-network/EON2024/blob/main/mc_session/data/raw_positions_2024.csv
    - icon: shop-window
      text: 2024 Station data
      href: https://www.ecowitt.net/home/share?authorize=6KX30B


---
::: {#image-heading}*
Data logger and measurement data
:::
